[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. Custom Sized Yard Signs | Banners.com # High Quality Yard Signs in Custom Sizes ### Tailored Size Yard Signs To Fit Any Project ![Various designs - custom size yard signs | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/add25099f180481c8e38b0220cba70d2.jpg) * [Product Overview](#e0234b25-4b84-4024-8057-228daf9a2bbc) #### Share Your Message With A Custom Sized Yard Sign \*\* All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.\*\* \*\* If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our [oversized flat shipping page](https://www.banners.com/oversized-signs-flat-shipping) or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300. \*\* \*\* Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design. \*\* Personalized yard signs serve as a flexible advertising solution, frequently placed in front yards for various purposes such as business promotion, political campaigns, real estate listings, and garage sales. These signs are ideal for numerous occasions due to their lightweight nature, simple setup, and affordability compared to other signage methods. Additionally, they effectively convey a brief message to those driving or walking by. Get started on your order today~ #### [Material](#materialCollapse) #### Full Color Custom Yard Signs These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4’ x 8’ sheet (the 96 in direction.) The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising. \*Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.\* ![Blank Coroplast Sheet](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-10-10-blank corrugated flat sign-500x300.jpg) ##### **Finishing Options** The following finishing options are available: • 1/2" in white margin or a full bleed (the ink goes all the way to the edge of the sign) • Single or double sided signs • Yard sign accessories: H Stake 10x15, 10x24 or 10x30. Beefy Stakes. Zip Ties 12 inches - Black and Zip Ties 36 inches - White. ##### Scoring All signs over 32" x 48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines. If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our [oversized flat shipping page](https://www.banners.com/oversized-signs-flat-shipping) or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300. #### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse) #### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse) The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the qua
